planUpgrade.title: Plan upgrade required
planUpgrade.deliveryNotes: Delivery notes are not included in your current plan. Upgrade to Professional or Enterprise to use this module.

landing.heroTitle: Operations management, now on a single platform
landing.heroDescription: Manage your teams, projects and inventory; track subcontractor work, performance and earnings with role-based access in one system.
landing.feature1Desc: Manage all teams, projects, stock movements and field activities from a single control panel.
landing.feature2Desc: Create teams, assign leaders and manage user permissions securely with role-based access.
landing.feature3Desc: Plan projects, create tasks and track field team progress in real time.
landing.feature4Desc: Manage subcontractor teams, monitor work and performance, and analyze earnings and costs.
landing.feature5Desc: Track materials in and out, view stock status in real time and keep operations under control.
landing.feature6Desc: Monitor and report on field teams, work done and operations in real time.
landing.benefit1Desc: Manage all your operations from a single panel. Central control of teams, projects, inventory and subcontractor processes reduces wasted time and operational costs.
landing.benefit2Desc: With real-time data flow, monitor team performance, project progress and field activities instantly. Make faster decisions and increase operational efficiency.
landing.benefit3Desc: With role-based access, managers, team leaders and subcontractors work within their own scope. All processes become transparent and controllable across the company.
landing.step1Desc: Users register on the platform and create their company. The system automatically assigns the company manager role and provides central control of company operations.
landing.step2Desc: Users create their own requests to join the company. The company manager approves these requests and adds users to the system as project managers or team leaders. All permissions are managed by role.
landing.step3Desc: Projects, tasks and field operations are planned on the platform. Teams work on assigned projects and all progress is tracked in the system in real time.
landing.step4Desc: Materials arriving at the warehouse are added to the system with delivery notes. Materials can be assigned to teams or projects. Usage is automatically recorded against the relevant project and team.
landing.pricingSubtitleLine1: Choose the plan that fits your operations best.
landing.pricingSubtitleLine2: Try free for 7 days, cancel anytime.
landing.pricingPromoBody: Enjoy these special prices throughout 2026. Don’t miss the early sign‑up offer.
landing.ctaTitle: Ready to digitize your field operations?
landing.footerCopyright: © 2026 MK-OPS — Powered by MK Digital Systems

privacy.lead: We take your privacy seriously on the MK-OPS platform. This Privacy Policy explains how your personal data is collected, used and protected when using the MK-OPS web application.
privacy.intro: By using the MK-OPS platform you accept the practices described in this Privacy Policy.
privacy.s1P: The MK-OPS platform is operated by:
privacy.s2P: The MK-OPS platform may collect the following types of data:
privacy.s2AccountList:
first and last name
email address
company name
privacy.s2UsageList:
projects created
team and role management data
task and operation records
system activities
privacy.s2TechList:
IP address
browser type
device information
session times
privacy.s2OpsList:
stock and material movements
delivery note records
team custody information
project activities
privacy.s2PaymentP: Payment transactions may be processed securely by third-party payment providers. MK-OPS does not store payment card details directly.
privacy.s3P: Collected data may be used for:
privacy.s3List:
providing and improving the service
managing user accounts
running platform features
ensuring system security
generating operation reports
communicating with users
fulfilling legal obligations
privacy.s3NoSell: MK-OPS does not sell or rent user data in any way.
privacy.s4P: User data may be processed on the following legal grounds:
privacy.s4List:
user's explicit consent
performance of the service contract
fulfilment of legal obligations
ensuring platform security
privacy.s5P1: Data may be shared with trusted service providers only when necessary for the operation of the service.
privacy.s5List:
Supabase (database and infrastructure services)
email service providers (for system notifications)
payment providers (for subscription processing)
privacy.s5P3: All third-party service providers must comply with data protection standards.
privacy.s6P1: MK-OPS implements various security measures to protect user data.
privacy.s6List:
HTTPS / SSL secure connection
encrypted data storage
access control mechanisms
system logs and audit records
privacy.s6P3: Only authorised persons may access the data.
privacy.s7List:
to request access to their personal data
to request correction of incorrect data
to request deletion of data
to withdraw consent for data processing
to request export of their data
privacy.s7P2: To exercise these rights, you may contact us at:
privacy.s8P1: The MK-OPS platform may use cookies or similar technologies for:
privacy.s8List:
maintaining user sessions
storing user preferences
measuring platform performance
privacy.s8P2: Users may disable cookies in their browser settings.
privacy.s9P1: User data is retained while the account is active or as long as necessary to provide the service.
privacy.s9P2: When an account is closed, data may be deleted or anonymised after a certain period.
privacy.s10P1: This Privacy Policy may be updated from time to time.
privacy.s10P2: Significant changes may be communicated to users via the platform or by email.
privacy.s11P: For questions about this privacy policy, you may contact us at:

terms.lead: Welcome to MK-OPS. You can access this service at the following address:
terms.intro: These Terms of Use ("Terms") govern your access to and use of the MK-OPS web application and services ("Service"). By accessing or using MK-OPS you agree to be bound by these Terms. If you do not accept these Terms, do not use the Service.
terms.s2P: MK-OPS is a software (SaaS) platform that enables companies to manage their operations digitally. The platform may offer:
terms.s2List:
Company creation and management
Role-based user authorisation
Project and task management
Team leader and project manager management
Operation process tracking
Stock and material management
Material entry via delivery notes
Material custody from warehouse to teams
Processing of materials used on projects
Subcontractor management, performance and earnings tracking
Reporting and operation analytics
terms.s3P: To use MK-OPS, users must create an account with accurate, current and complete information. You are responsible for the security of your login details. The user is responsible for all actions under their account.
terms.s4P: MK-OPS is a multi-tenant system. Each company can access its own data only through its authorised users.
terms.s4List:
The first user who creates the company is designated as company manager by the system.
There is one company manager.
Other users wishing to join the system create their own applications.
New users' joining a company is subject to company manager approval.
Users are authorised on a role basis.
There may be multiple project managers and team leaders within the system.
terms.s5P1: MK-OPS may offer paid or free plans. Pricing, payment period and plan contents for paid plans are set out on the relevant pricing page.
terms.s5P2: Payment infrastructure may be provided by third-party payment providers. The user agrees to the processing of payments according to the plan they choose.
terms.s6P: MK-OPS may offer a free trial on certain plans. At the end of the trial, the subscription may continue as paid unless cancelled by the user. Trial conditions are also set out on the relevant plan screen.
terms.s7P1: Users may cancel their subscription via account settings or the relevant management area. After cancellation, access may continue until the end of the current billing period.
terms.s7P2Before: Refund conditions are set out in the separate
terms.s7P2After: . Payments may not be refunded except where required by law.
terms.s8P1: Users agree to use the Service in accordance with law and fair use. The following actions are prohibited:
terms.s8List:
Using the Service for illegal purposes
Attempting unauthorised access to other companies' or users' data
Disrupting, blocking or damaging the system
Attempting to reverse engineer any part of the platform
Attempting unauthorised copying, transfer or export of data
terms.s8P2: Violation of these rules may result in suspension or permanent closure of the account.
terms.s9P1Before: MK-OPS collects and processes user data and usage information in accordance with the
terms.s9P1After: . By using the Service you agree to the processing of this data for the stated purposes.
terms.s9P2: Data may be used for the provision, development and security of the service and for operational purposes.
terms.s10P: All content, software, designs, brands, interfaces and system structures of the MK-OPS platform are the intellectual property of the service provider unless otherwise stated. They may not be copied, reproduced, modified or used for commercial purposes without written permission.
terms.s11P: MK-OPS may update these Terms from time to time. Significant changes may be communicated to users by email or in-app notification. Continued use of the Service means you accept the updated Terms.
terms.s12P: These Terms shall be interpreted and applied in accordance with the laws of the Republic of Turkey, subject to mandatory legal provisions.
terms.s13P: For questions about these Terms you may use the following contact details:

refund.lead: Thank you for choosing the MK-OPS platform. MK-OPS is a SaaS platform that helps companies manage their operations.
refund.intro: This Refund Policy explains how subscription fees, cancellations and refund requests are handled when using the MK-OPS service.
refund.s1P1: The MK-OPS platform may offer a free trial on certain plans.
refund.s1P2: During the trial, users can try the platform at no cost. If you cancel before the trial ends, no charges will be made.
refund.s1P3: When the trial ends and the subscription is not cancelled, billing may begin according to the selected plan.
refund.s2P1: MK-OPS subscriptions may be billed monthly or annually depending on the plan chosen.
refund.s2P2: Payments may be processed securely through third-party payment providers. By starting a subscription, users are deemed to have agreed to billing according to their chosen plan.
refund.s3P1: As a general rule, payments made after the billing period has started are not refunded.
refund.s3P2: Refund requests may be considered in the following cases:
refund.s3List:
duplicate or incorrect charges
serious technical issues that completely prevent access to the service
cases required by applicable law
refund.s3P3: All refund requests must be reviewed together with payment date, plan details and required documents. Requests must be submitted through the contact channels below.
refund.s4P: For questions about the refund policy or your requests, you may contact us at:

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.newUserPending: {userName} requested to join the company. Approve in Users.
notifications.pmJobApproved: {actorName} approved daily work for team {teamCode}, project {projectKey}.

deliveryNotes.title: Delivery Notes
deliveryNotes.atLeastOneLine: Add at least one line with material name, unit and quantity.
deliveryNotes.accessRestricted: Only Company Manager and Project Manager can access Delivery Notes.
deliveryNotes.lineItemsHint: For each line, Material Name is required; Type, Size and Material ID are optional. Unit (pcs, meter, kg, cubic meter) and quantity must be selected. On receive, items are merged into stock according to the new grouping rule; no editing after receive.

projects.title: Campaigns
projects.name: Project name
projects.confirmMarkCompleted: Are you sure? This will mark the project as completed.
projects.cannotCompletePendingApprovals: Cannot complete project while there are pending approvals.
projects.projectIdExists: This Project ID is already registered.
projects.projectKeyExists: This project key (year + external ID) is already registered.
projects.projectYearInvalid: Project year must be between 2000 and 2100.
projects.projectExternalIdEmpty: External Project ID cannot be empty.
projects.projectNotFound: Project not found. Please select an existing project.

teams.title: Teams
teams.noEligibleLeaders: No active Team Leaders in this company.
teams.noLeaderNoTeam: A team cannot be created without a Team Leader. Add and approve a user with the Team Leader or Project Manager role first.
teams.planTeamLimitReached: Starter plan allows up to 3 teams; Professional allows 6. Upgrade to add more.

validation.leaderRequired: Team Leader is required to create a team.
validation.planTeamLimitReached: Team limit reached for your plan. Upgrade to add more teams.
validation.leaderMustBeTeamLeader: Leader must have the Team Leader role (403).
validation.leaderMustBeTeamLeaderOrPM: Leader must be a Team Leader or Project Manager. Company Manager cannot be team leader.
validation.leaderWrongCompany: Leader must belong to this company.
validation.leaderNotActive: Leader must be an active (approved) user.
validation.leaderAlreadyAssigned: This user is already leader of another team.

catalog.codeMustBeFiveDigits: Work item code must be exactly 5 digits (e.g. 00001).
catalog.codeMustBeUnique: This work item code is already used for this company.
catalog.unitTypeRequired: Work item unit type (e.g. meter, piece, etc.) is required.
catalog.unitPriceMustBePositive: Unit price must be greater than zero.

jobs.title: Daily Job Entry
jobs.noTeamsAvailable: No teams available for your role.

validation.teamNotAllowed: You can only use teams you lead.

jobs.selectTeamToViewZimmet: Select a team to view assigned materials.
jobs.payrollPeriodClosed: This payroll period is closed. Please select a date in the active period.

material.externalDescriptionRequired: Description is required for external material usage.
material.insufficientStock: Insufficient stock. This material cannot be used.

materials.limitReached: Maximum number of items reached for this material type.
materials.customGroupRequired: Custom material type name is required.
materials.customGroupLimit: You can define at most 10 different custom material types.
materials.customVariantLimit: You can define at most 10 variants for this custom material type.
materials.spoolIdUnique: This Spool ID is already in use.
materials.externalNoteRequired: Description is required when using external material.
materials.stockFromDeliveryNotes: Material stock is added only via Delivery Notes (receive).

errors.teamLeaderCannotMutate: Team Leader cannot add, distribute, or edit stock.
errors.sameTeamTransfer: Cannot transfer to the same team.
errors.amountExceedsAllocation: Amount cannot exceed the quantity assigned to the team.

settings.title: Settings
settings.companyProfileRestricted: Only Company Manager can edit company profile.
settings.joinCodeHint: 4 digits. Used only when new members join your company during registration. Do not share publicly.
settings.logoBucketMissing: Storage bucket "company-logos" does not exist. In Supabase Dashboard go to Storage → New bucket → name "company-logos" → set to Public → Create.
settings.startDayOfMonthHint: Period starts on this day and ends the day before the same day next month. Example: 20 → Feb 20 – Mar 19.

validation.startDayRange: Start day must be between 1 and 28.

settings.accessRestricted: Only Company Manager and Project Manager can access Settings.
